title: Auction of Government of India Dated Securities
description: Government of India (GoI) has announced the sale (re-issue) of two dated securities for a notified amount of ₹29,000 crore as per the following details: Sr No Security Date of Repayment Notified Amount (₹ Crore) GoI specific Notification Auction Date Settlement Date 1 6.68% GS 2040 Jul 07, 2040 16,000 F.No.4(1)-B(W&M)/2025 dated March 02, 2026 March 06, 2026 (Friday) March 09, 2026 (Monday) 2 6.90% GS 2065 Apr 15, 2065 13,000   Total   29,000       2. GoI
